changelog:
Hey everyone — Laviesss here (with a little help from my AI pair-coder Sisyphus). We're just getting started.

**v0.1.1** is a cleanup-and-polish release. The core engine from v0.1 was solid, but now InputBlocker is starting to feel like a real system tool instead of something you have to keep opening.

**What's new:**

**🎮 Shake-to-Toggle**
Give your phone a shake — blocking toggles on and off. Three sensitivity presets so you don't trigger it by accident (because nothing's worse than your ghost-tap fixer ghost-tapping itself). Works right through the overlay, no app launch needed.

**🔔 Rich Notification**
The notification grew up. Shows your active profile and three buttons:
- **Pause / Resume** — quick toggle
- **Cycle Profile** — flip between configs on the fly
- **Safe Mode** — emergency disable without hunting for the app

**🔄 Profile Name in QS Tile**
Your current profile shows in the Quick Settings tile subtitle (Android 10+). Tap to toggle blocking, name updates automatically.

**Behind the scenes**
- Crash-path hardening — InputBlocker won't leave you stranded if the Xposed hook stumbles
- Smarter root/LSPosed detection at startup with cleaner auto-restart behavior
- CI pipeline cleaned up and fully green

**What's coming (v0.2.0 and beyond):**
- **Auto-detection** — DBSCAN-based ghost tap clustering that suggests blocking regions for you. *This one's been designed and specced, now it's time to build it.*
- Community preset sharing
- Smarter profile rules
- Better onboarding

This is still early days. Flash the module, enable in LSPosed, and your screen stays usable. Ghosts get blocked. More coming soon.

— Laviesss (+ Sisyphus)

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 101 |

### 🆘 Support
- **Issues**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/issues
- **Security**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/security/advisories
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker#readme
